inputs.command:
set -e
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends jq
mkdir -p /workspace/e2e
jq --version > /workspace/e2e/jq-version.txt
printf 'startup package installed\n' > /workspace/e2e/package-installed.txt

set -e
mkdir -p /workspace/.runpod_agentic/launcher.d/harnesses /workspace/e2e
cat > /workspace/.runpod_agentic/launcher.d/harnesses/pi.sh <<'PI_HARNESS'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /workspace/e2e
{
  echo 'prompt:'
  cat "${AGENT_PROMPT_FILE:-/workspace/.runpod_agentic/prompt.txt}"
  echo
  echo 'skills:'
  find /workspace/.codex/skills -maxdepth 3 -type f \( -name 'SKILL.md' -o -name '*.md' \) | sort | sed 's#^/workspace/.codex/skills/##'
  echo
  echo 'database:'
  printf '%s\n' "${DATABASE_URL:-}"
  echo
  echo 'llm:'
  printf '%s\n' "${OLLAMA_HOST:-}"
} > /workspace/e2e/agent-skill-report.txt
PI_HARNESS
chmod +x /workspace/.runpod_agentic/launcher.d/harnesses/pi.sh

inputs.system_prompt: You are a local preflight agent. Use the installed skills and report what is available.

inputs.prompt: List the skills available to you. Include the Postgres database URL host and the Ollama Cloud endpoint you were configured with.
